summary: Meditation/mindfulness app with a pre-meditation page being refactored into isolated components. A self-contained MindfulnessGuide component is being extracted with its own UI and logic (More Details navigation, Previous/Next buttons).
architectural_notes: MindfulnessGuide component should be fully self-contained: owns its UI (container, title, content) and all logic (More Details navigation to knowledge page, Previous/Next navigation)

existing_features.title: Create a new `MindfulnessGuide` component (e.g., `frontend/src/components/MindfulnessGuide.tsx`) that encapsulates everything related to the meditation guide section currently rendered inside `PreMeditationPage`: its outer container, title, step content, and the `MeditationGuideStepper` (or equivalent inline rendering). The component should accept the current meditation type (and any content data it needs) as props.

Move the **More Details** button and its navigation logic (routing/redirecting to the Knowledge page) entirely inside the `MindfulnessGuide` component. `PreMeditationPage` must not contain any routing call or handler related to the More Details action.

Move the **Previous** and **Next** step-navigation button logic (current step index state, increment/decrement handlers, boundary conditions) entirely inside the `MindfulnessGuide` component. The component manages its own step state internally.

Update `PreMeditationPage` to replace all extracted guide-related markup and state with a single `<MindfulnessGuide meditationType={...} />` usage. Ensure no orphaned state variables, handlers, or JSX fragments related to the guide remain in `PreMeditationPage`.

new_feature_requests.summary: Refactor pre-meditation page: extract self-contained MindfulnessGuide component with its container, title, content, More Details button (navigation to knowledge page), and Previous/Next button logic
